name: tom-ai-extension
description: AI-powered workspace automation with Copilot, Local LLM, and AI Chat integration

chatVariables.name: todo
chatVariables.description: Current todo summary from the active quest

commands.title: @T: Start Tom CLI Integration Server (Custom Port)

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_createFile
languageModelTools.userDescription: Create a new file with content
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Create a new file with the specified content. Creates parent directories if needed.

filePath.description: The path to the file to create. Can be absolute or relative to workspace root.

content.description: The content to write to the file.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_readFile
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Read the contents of a file. Optionally specify line range.

filePath.description: The path to the file to read.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_editFile
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Edit a file by replacing oldText with newText. The oldText must match exactly.

filePath.description: The path to the file to edit.

oldText.description: The exact text to find and replace.

newText.description: The text to replace oldText with.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_multiEditFile
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Apply multiple find/replace edits across one or more files.

edits.description: Array of edit operations to apply.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_listDirectory
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List the contents of a directory. Directories have a trailing slash.

dirPath.description: The path to the directory to list.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_findFiles
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Find files matching a glob pattern in the workspace.

pattern.description: Glob pattern to match files, e.g. '**/*.ts' or 'src/**/*.dart'

maxResults.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default 100.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_findTextInFiles
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Search for text in files using grep. Returns matching lines with file paths and line numbers.

searchText.description: The text or regex pattern to search for.

filePattern.description: Optional glob pattern to filter files, e.g. '*.dart'

isRegex.description: Whether searchText is a regex pattern. Default false.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of matching lines to return. Default 50.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_runCommand
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Run a shell command and return the output.

cwd.description: Optional working directory for the command.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_runVscodeCommand
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Execute a VS Code command by ID.

command.description: The VS Code command ID to execute.

args.description: Optional arguments to pass to the command.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_getErrors
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get errors and warnings from VS Code diagnostics.

filePath.description: Optional file path to get errors for. If not specified, returns all errors.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_fetchWebpage
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Fetch the content of a URL.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_readGuideline
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Read workspace Copilot guidelines from _copilot_guidelines/ folder. Without a fileName, returns the list of available files and the content of index.md (the main guideline index). Key guidelines: coding_guidelines.md (code structure, naming), documentation_guidelines.md (docs format), tests.md (test creation), project_structure.md (project patterns), bug_fixing.md (debugging workflow). Use this tool to understand workspace conventions before making changes.

fileName.description: Optional specific guideline file to read (e.g., 'coding_guidelines.md' or 'coding_guidelines'). If not specified, returns index.md with list of available files.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_webSearch
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Search the web using DuckDuckGo. Returns titles, URLs, and snippets of the top results. Use this to research topics, find documentation, or discover solutions.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default 8.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_manageTodo
languageModelTools.userDescription: Manage temporary scratch todos (not quest todos)
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Optional: Manage a temporary scratch todo list for this prompt run. This is NOT the quest todo system. Operations: 'list' (view todos), 'add' (create with title/description), 'update' (change status/title/description by id), 'remove' (delete by id), 'clear' (remove all). Status values: not-started, in-progress, completed. Use when you have 3+ distinct steps to track.

operation.description: The operation to perform: list (view todos), add (create new), update (modify existing), remove (delete), clear (remove all).

id.description: Todo ID. Required for 'update' and 'remove' operations.

title.description: Short headline for the todo (3-7 words). Required for 'add', optional for 'update'.

description.description: Detailed description of the task. Optional for 'add' and 'update'.

filterStatus.description: Filter by status when using 'list' operation.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_notifyUser
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Send a notification to the user via Telegram (if configured) or VS Code notification. Use when you need attention, complete a long task, or encounter a blocking issue.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_getWorkspaceInfo
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Detect which workspace is open, current quest, role, and active projects. No parameters required.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_listTodos
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List todos from a quest, optionally filtered by status, file, or tags.

file.description: Specific todo file name, or "all" to aggregate.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_getAllTodos
languageModelTools.userDescription: List combined quest and session todos
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get ALL todos from ALL sources in a single call: quest YAML files + window session. This is the preferred tool when you need a complete picture of all pending work.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_getTodo
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get one quest todo by ID
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get a single todo by ID from a quest.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_createTodo
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Create a new todo item in a quest YAML file. YAML formatting is preserved.

file.description: Target YAML file name within the quest folder. Defaults to persistent file.

id.description: Unique todo ID (lowercase, starts with letter).

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_updateTodo
languageModelTools.userDescription: Update a quest todo by ID
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Update fields of an existing quest todo. YAML formatting is preserved.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_moveTodo
languageModelTools.userDescription: Move a quest todo between quest files
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Move a todo from one YAML file to another within a quest folder.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_sessionTodo_add
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Add a self-reminder todo for this prompt session. Use to avoid forgetting postponed tasks, deferred decisions, or follow-up items.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_sessionTodo_list
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List prompt session todos, optionally filtered by status or tags.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_sessionTodo_getAll
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get ALL prompt session todos in a single call with counts. No filtering.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_sessionTodo_update
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Update a prompt session todo (mark done, change title/priority).

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_sessionTodo_delete
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Delete a prompt session todo.

id.description: The session todo ID to delete.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_readLocalGuideline
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Read local LLM guidelines from _copilot_local/ folder. Without a fileName, returns the list of available files and the content of index.md. Use this tool to understand workspace conventions before making changes.

fileName.description: Optional specific guideline file to read.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_queue_list
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List prompt queue items with status, IDs, reminder metadata, and follow-up counts.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_queue_update_item
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Update editable queue item fields including text/template/wrapper and reminder settings.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_queue_set_status
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Set queue item status to staged or pending.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_queue_send_now
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Send one staged/pending queue item immediately.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_queue_remove_item
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Remove a queue item by ID.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_queue_update_followup
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Update follow-up fields for a queue item.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_queue_remove_followup
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Remove a follow-up prompt from a queue item.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_timed_list
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List timed request entries with schedule and reminder metadata.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_timed_update_entry
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Update timed entry fields (text/template/schedule/reminder/enabled).

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_timed_remove_entry
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Remove a timed request entry by ID.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_timed_set_engine_state
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Enable or disable the global timed request engine.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_templates_manage
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List/create/update/delete prompt templates used by queue and timed requests.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_reminders_manage
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List/create/update/delete reminder templates used by queue and timed reminders.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_deleteTodo
languageModelTools.userDescription: Delete a quest todo by ID
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Delete a todo item from a quest by its ID.

todoId.description: The todo item ID to delete.

sourceFile.description: Optional source file hint (relative to quest folder).

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_listQuests
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List all quest directory IDs under _ai/quests/. Optionally include overview file presence and todo count.

includeOverview.description: Include overview file and todo presence (default false).

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_listProjects
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List all projects from .tom_metadata/tom_master.yaml.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_listDocuments
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List files in a workspace document category: prompts, answers, notes, roles, or guidelines.

subPath.description: Optional sub-path within the category folder.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_workspaceTodo_list
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List all *.todo.yaml todos across the entire workspace. Optionally filter by status.

status.description: Filter by status (e.g. not-started, in-progress, done).

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_askBigBrother
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Query VS Code language models (GitHub Copilot, Claude, GPT-4, etc.) from your local LLM. Operations: 'list' for available models, 'query' to send a prompt. This is your escalation path for complex questions requiring broader knowledge.

operation.description: 'list' to see available models, 'query' to ask a model.

modelId.description: Model ID, family, or name to query. If omitted, uses configured default.

prompt.description: The question or prompt to send to the model. Required for 'query' operation.

enableTools.description: Enable VS Code tools for the model. Default: from config.

maxIterations.description: Maximum tool iterations when enableTools=true. Default: from config.

languageModelTools.name: tomAi_askCopilot
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Send a question to GitHub Copilot via the chat window and wait for a response via answer file. Useful for questions benefiting from Copilot's full context of open files and workspace.

waitForAnswer.description: Whether to wait for answer file. Default: true.

timeoutMs.description: Max time to wait for answer in milliseconds. Default: from config.

tomAi.contextApproach.description: Context persistence approach for AI operations

tomAi.configPath.description: Path to the extension configuration file (supports ~ for home directory and ${workspaceFolder})

tomAi.queueFolder.description: Queue folder path (absolute or workspace-relative). Empty defaults to ${aiFolder}/queue.

tomAi.bridge.restartDelay.description: Delay between bridge restart attempts in milliseconds

tomAi.bridge.maxRestarts.description: Maximum number of bridge restart attempts

tomAi.timedRequests.tickInterval.description: Timed request engine tick interval in milliseconds

tomAi.copilot.showNotifications.description: Show notifications when sending text to Copilot Chat

tomAi.copilot.answerFolder.description: Folder path for chat answer files (relative to workspace root)

tomAi.tomAiChat.modelId.description: Model ID for Tom AI chat

tomAi.tomAiChat.tokenModelId.description: Model ID used for token count estimates

tomAi.tomAiChat.preProcessingModelId.description: Model ID for pre-processing step (cheap model to gather context before main processing)

tomAi.tomAiChat.enablePromptOptimization.description: Enable pre-processing step with cheap model to gather context before main processing

tomAi.localLlm.ollamaUrl.description: Ollama server URL (fallback; prefer localLlm section in send_to_chat.json)

tomAi.todo.workspaceTodoFile.description: Workspace-relative path to the workspace todo YAML file used by WORKSPACE TODOS views

tomAi.notes.questNotesPattern.description: Pattern for quest notes file path. Supports ${quest} and ${workspaceFolder}.

tomAi.todo.questTodoPattern.description: Pattern for quest todo filename used by QUEST TODOS view. Supports ${quest}.

tomAi.guidelines.excludeGlobs.description: Glob patterns excluded when building the non-recursive Project list in the Guidelines panel.

tomAi.projectDetection.excludeGlobs.description: Glob patterns excluded from full-workspace project detection scans.

scripts.compile: tsc -p ./ && mkdir -p out/config && cp src/config/*.json out/config/
